About Me

Crafting software that
actually matters

I'm Mohammad Shahid Sajjad Pinjari, a Full Stack Developer and AI Enthusiast based in India. I build modern web applications, AI-powered tools, and scalable backend systems.

My journey started with curiosity — how does a website really work? Today I ship production-ready applications using React, Node.js, Python, and cutting-edge AI APIs. I care deeply about clean code and great user experience.

UI/UX & Frontend

CampusKey — AI Study Companion

My Journey

Experience & Growth

2021

The Beginning

Wrote my first lines of HTML and CSS. Something clicked — I knew software was my path forward.

2022

Full Stack Journey

Dived deep into React and Node.js. Built first full stack applications with MongoDB. Started understanding architecture.

2023

Python & APIs

Mastered backend engineering, REST APIs, and Python automation. Shipped first production systems used by real users.

2024

AI Integration

Started integrating OpenAI APIs into real products. Built CampusKey — an AI study companion used by students nationwide.

2025

Shipping Products

Building full AI-powered SaaS platforms. Helping businesses and students automate with intelligent software solutions.

What I Offer

Services

01

Full Stack Development

End-to-end web applications — React frontends, Node.js backends, database design, and deployment.

02

AI & Automation

Intelligent systems powered by OpenAI. Chatbots, content engines, workflow automation, and LLM integration.

03

Backend & APIs

Scalable RESTful APIs with authentication, caching, rate limiting, and comprehensive documentation.

04

Python Development

Custom scripts, data processing pipelines, web scrapers, and workflow automation tools.

05

UI / UX Design

Clean, responsive interfaces built with attention to detail, accessibility, and user experience.

06

Dashboard & Analytics

Data dashboards with real-time charts, filters, exports, and role-based access control.
